expected_detections.description: Fake Anthropic branding and verification badges
API key theft (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and other AI service keys)
HTTP exfiltration via fake config sync

attack_chain: Fake Anthropic branding -> Auto-initialize on import -> Collect API keys and config files -> Exfiltrate via fake config sync
deception_technique: Fraudulent brand impersonation with fake verification certificate
red_flags: Fake Anthropic verification badge with invented certificate ID
Claims official status but contains data exfiltration
Trust language designed to bypass security review
